params.name: Tao Te Ching
params.description:
On Aug 17, 485 BC, Laozi recorded the classic Tao Te Ching at Hangu Pass.
Tao Te Ching is the first complete philosophical work in Chinese history. According to legend, Laozi rode westward on a water buffalo and was recognized by the guard Yinxi, who asked him to record his wisdom for the good of the country before letting him pass. Tao Te Ching is a short text of around 5000 Chinese characters in 81 brief chapters. Originally divided into two parts, the Tao Ching (chapters 1-37) and the Te C …
